title: coccoloba arborescens
intro: Coccoloba arborescens, also known as the Beach Morning Glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygonaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coccoloba arborescens are attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
